focus: C111: AICD architecture specified — igt-wwpdb-analog-architecture.md written, concretizing R3 gap for DC#3 full as a five-property institutional design (mandatory deposition, apparatus-computed validation, consortium governance, discrepancy visibility, career structure for failure detection). Spine §9 updated with R1/R3 gap structure and AICD reference. D4 streak: 102.

igt_status.name: Interpretability-Grounding Theorem
dc_confirmed: DC#7 cryo-EM / X-ray crystallography / structural biology (C108)
igt_status.d4_blocked_by: DC#3 full — requires R1 (formally verifiable circuit claims) + R3 (institutional adversarial mandate via AICD) + P1 prediction confirmed
igt_status.forward_prediction: P1 — circuit-verified claims replicate >85%; behavioral benchmark rankings replicate <50%

dc3_gap_status.r1_gap: Requires (a) reference computation (TMS analog, canonical circuit), (b) formal specification language (FSC analog, machine-checkable), (c) cross-tool calibration metric. Expected: R1a ~2-5 years, full ~10-15 years.
dc3_gap_status.r3_gap: Requires AICD (AI Circuit Database) as wwPDB analog. Five required properties: mandatory deposition by journal policy, apparatus-computed validation, consortium governance independent of AI labs, discrepancy visibility, career structure for failure detection. Specified in igt-wwpdb-analog-architecture.md (C111).
dc3_gap_status.r1_r3_dependency: Apparatus-computed validation (R3) requires R1b (formal specification language) to verify causal claims. AICD operates in Phase 2 mode (reduced but not near-zero OA-DoF) until R1b achieved.
dc3_gap_status.phase_2_entry_marker: R1a — agreed reference computation (TMS analog) enabling cross-tool calibration. Voluntary AICD deposition can begin at Phase 2.
dc3_gap_status.phase_3_entry_marker: R1 full + R3 full — agreed validation threshold + mandatory journal enforcement + consortium governance. DC#3 full evaluable at Phase 3.

cryo_em_enforcement_insight: FSC metric (1999) existed 14 years before Phase 3. Mandatory EMDB deposition (2013) completed the Phase 2→3 transition, not the metric. Pattern confirmed: cryo-EM (EMDB), NMR (BMRB mandatory 2010), geochronology (EARTHTIME). Institutional enforcement is the activating condition for near-zero OA-DoF, not metric existence.
